Class-Fighter 20 — Female Human Fighter: 20
Strength: 12 (+1) Dexterity: 18 (+4) Constitution: 14 (+2) Intelligence: 13 (+1) Wisdom: 11 (+0) Charisma: 16 (+3)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Evil Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 3; Dexterity: 1; Strength: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 408966/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 180/360
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Truesight: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Ability Boosts: 7 to distribute
Tactical Mind: Can add 1d10 to a failed ability check, expending a use of Second Wind if the result is a success
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; Fighting Style: 2; General: 7; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighter Primary Ability): 1; Fighter (Fighter Subclass): 1; Fighter (Maneuver): 9
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Archery; Boon Of The Night Spirit; Boon Of Truesight; Defense; Great Weapon Fighting; Magic Initiate (Druid); Savage Attacker; Skilled; Two-Weapon Fighting Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Fighter Features: Action Surge; Additional Fighting Style; Arcane Charge; Armor Training (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Battle Master; Bulwark Of Force; Champion; Combat Superiority; Eldritch Knight; Eldritch Strike; Epic Boon; Extra Attack; Fighter Primary Ability; Fighter Subclass; Fighting Style; Guarded Mind; Heroic Warrior; Improved Combat Superiority; Improved Critical; Improved War Magic; Indomitable; Know Your Enemy; Psi Warrior; Psionic Power; Relentless; Remarkable Athlete; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion; Perception, Survival); Spellcasting; Strength; Student Of War; Studied Attacks; Superior Critical; Survivor; Tactical Master; Tactical Mind; Tactical Shift; Telekinetic Adept; Telekinetic Master; Three Extra Attacks; Two Extra Attacks; Ultimate Combat Superiority; War Bond; War Magic; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Additional Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Fighter Primary Ability: 1 selection
Fighter Subclass: 1 selection
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Telekinetic Adept: Has Psi-Powered Leap and Telekinetic Thrust features
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +4 Insight: (wis) +6 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +6 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +7 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +7
Athletics: (str) +7 Medicine: (wis) +0 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +7 Stealth: (dex) +4
History: (int) +7 Perception: (wis) +0 Survival: (wis) +0
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Arcana; Athletics; History; Insight; Nature; Perception, Survival; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Skill Notes:
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Student Of War: Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools)
Boon Of Truesight: Has 60' Truesight
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Remarkable Athlete: Has advantage on Athletics
Combat
Hit Points: 119 Initiative: +10 Armor Class: 18
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Splint Shield: None Weapons: Greataxe (+7 1d12+1 S; Cleave); Greatsword (+7 2d6+1 S; Graze); Heavy Crossbow (+10 1d10+4 P R100/400; Push); Unarmed Strike (+7 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +40
Defense: +1 Armor Class in armor
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +4
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +4
Improved Combat Superiority: Superiority Dice increase to d10
Improved War Magic: Has increased War Magic effects
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Survivor: Has the Defy Death and Heroic Rally features
Three Extra Attacks: Has increased Extra Attack effects
Two Extra Attacks: Has increased Extra Attack effects
Ultimate Combat Superiority: Superiority Dice increase to d12
Action Surge: Can take an extra action 2 times per short rest
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Boon Of The Night Spirit: Can use a bonus action to become invisible in dim or no light; taking an action, bonus action, or reaction ends
Bulwark Of Force: R30' Can use a bonus action to give 1 target half cover for 1 min once per long rest; can spend Psionic Energy dice for additional uses
Combat Superiority: Can use a d12 Superiority Die to perform one of 9 chosen Maneuvers 6 times per short rest
Eldritch Strike: Successful attack inflicts disadvantage on the first save vs. a self spell before the end of the next turn
Extra Attack: Can make 4 attacks during an Attack action
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Heroic Rally: Regains 7 hit points each rd when between 1 and 59 hit points
Heroic Warrior: Can give self Heroic Inspiration at the start of each turn
Improved Critical: Scores a possible critical on a natural 19
Know Your Enemy: Knows how foe compares to self after 1 min study
Relentless: Has a minimum of 1 Superiority Die available after initiative
Remarkable Athlete: Has advantage on initiative and can move 15' after scoring a critical hit without provoking opportunity attacks
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+20 hit points 4 times per long rest; can regain 1 use after a short rest
Studied Attacks: Missed attack gives advantage on the next attack on the same target before the end of the next turn
Superior Critical: Scores a potential critical on a natural 18
Tactical Master: Can use a mastery weapon to Push, Sap, or Slow
Tactical Shift: Using Second Wind allows moving 15' without provoking opportunity attacks
Trip Attack: +18
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
War Bond: Cannot be disarmed from a bonded weapon and can use a bonus action to summon one
War Magic: Can use a bonus action to make a weapon attack after casting a spell
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 6 chosen kinds of Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +8; Dexterity: +4; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +7; Wisdom: +0
Save Notes:
Boon Of The Night Spirit: In dim or no light, has resistance to all damage other than psychic and radiant
Defy Death: Has advantage on death saves, and a roll of 18-19 on one gains the benefits of a 20
Guarded Mind: Has resistance to psychic damage/Can spend 1 Psionic Energy die to end charmed and frightened conditions
Indomitable: Can reroll a failed save, adding a +20 bonus, 3 times per long rest
Magic
Spell Slots: W0: 3; W1: 4; W2: 3; W3: 3; W4: 1 Attack: C: +6; D: +6; Fighter: +7; W: +7 Spell DC: C: 14; D: 14; Fighter: 15; W: 15
Spells: Telekinesis (Fighter5 [Telekinetic Master] Tran): R60' Self can mentally restrain and move 1 Huge creature or object 30' (save Strength negates) each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Magic Notes:
Arcane Charge: Can teleport 30' during Action Surge
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the Wizard spell list
Telekinetic Master: Can cast Telekinesis and use bonus actions while concentrating to make a weapon attack each rd once per long rest; can spend Psionic Energy dice for additional uses
Notes
Validation Errors:
Selectable Feature Allocation: 11 available vs. 5 allocated
Skill And Tool Proficiency Allocation: 7 available vs. 6 allocated
Tool Proficiency Allocation: 1 available vs. 0 allocated
